creator: hyun@caffeinated.codes
text:
Created attachment 203680
SVN diff for sourcehansans ports

One diff to address all four ports, because these four share the same distfile.

Japanse port (japanese/sourcehansans-otf) is the master port, which other three (chinese/sourcehansans-sc-otf, chinese/sourcehansans-tc-otf, and korean/sourcehansans-otf) depends on.

FYI, these files were removed as part of this update:
* chinese/sourcehansans-sc-otf/distinfo
* chinese/sourcehansans-sc-otf/files/pkg-message.in
* chinese/sourcehansans-tc-otf/distinfo
* chinese/sourcehansans-tc-otf/files/pkg-message.in
* korean/sourcehansans-otf/distinfo
* korean/sourcehansans-otf/files/pkg-message.in
